programme.title: One Day in My Body
programme.desc: Following people whose extreme bodies force them to navigate life differently, capturing defining moments with unfiltered access to their world.

programme.title: The Bad Foot Clinic
programme.desc: Podiatrist Marion solves the mystery of Jonathan's twisted toes, gets marathon runner Robert's feet fit for his next race and helps a drag queen back into heels.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: The Bad Foot Clinic
programme.desc: Podiatrist Marion suggests toe surgery for a mother and daughter with similar issues; a gruesome treatment makes actor Jim anxious.

Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: One Day in My Body
programme.desc: Lukas has Parry-Romberg Syndrome, causing half his face to shrink inward; Stefani's rare muscular dystrophy leaves her dependent on her mother but craving independence; Ellie says steroid withdrawal left her with lizard skin and seeks a cure.

programme.title: 1000-lb Roomies
programme.desc: Jaz preps for surgery; Nesha gets a health wake-up call; as Jaz recovers from a fall, both women face deep emotional reckonings; reunited with her daughter, Jaz urges Nesha to make lasting changes of her own.

programme.desc: Phil and Claire aren't sure what to think when Haley and Andy start spending a lot of time together; Gloria hires a Spanish tutor for Manny; Cam and Mitch run into a popular journalist at a school function.

programme.desc: The couples head to the desert for a group therapy called Compromise Canyon; they carry rocks that represent their issues and need to lighten their loads by hashing it out; Gino and Jasmine get into a huge fight; Jasmine calls a friend for support.
